description: A patient has a credit balance on their account due to an overpayment. A refund check needs to be issued.

nodes.task_description: Identify a patient account with a credit balance from a work queue.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds an account that is due a refund.

nodes.task_description: Verify the reason for the credit balance and confirm no other outstanding balances exist for the patient.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the credit is valid and a refund is due.

nodes.task_description: Request a refund check to be issued to the patient for the credit amount.

expected_outcome.value: A request is sent to accounts payable to cut a check, and the patient's balance is zeroed out.
